name: roomio-persistence
description: Agent C work-stream 2: Persistence & Sharing. Trustworthy debounced autosave (Saving…/Saved status, optimistic UI, manual save, unsaved-exit guard, retry-never-drop), a 'My Designs' library (thumbnail/rename/duplicate/delete+undo), and friendly sharing — a view-only showcase link that reuses Agent B's flythrough and NEVER exposes the editor or other designs. Serializes the FULL scene (house C + interiors A + lighting E) in one versioned envelope. Local-first storage + .roomio export/import; cloud accounts + live URLs are a scoped follow-on. Drop-in library + standalone demo harness; no edits to A/B/E source.
